finding: Lymphoproliferative Disease After Transplantation — Others: skin, eye, area of prior trauma / surgery, bone marrow (uncommon) (DDx)
context: multifocal discrete round hypovascular parenchymal masses (almost always unilateral) | diffuse infiltrative disease → renal enlargement | solitary hyperdense typically periventricular mass usually surrounded by vasogenic | extremely hypermetabolic active lesions
